title: BasicProfile
description: Set of Personally Identifiable Information (PII) associated with a given client.

firstName.description:
First name of the client.
**Conditional Mandatory*** field - Required while creating new client.

middleName1.description:
Middle name 1 of the client.
This field is required if configured as **Business Mandatory*** .

middleName2.description:
Middle name 2 of the client. Not applicable for Add-on client.
This field is required if configured as **Business Mandatory*** .

lastName.description:
Last name of the client.
**Conditional Mandatory*** field - Required while creating new client.
